hero_subtitle: Get to know us a little better
description: FiNext is an financial dashboard built by three developers who believe that understanding your finances shouldn't require a finance degree. We focus on clean data visualization, intuitive UX, and a codebase worth being proud of.

edu.title: Eduardo Rubio Chaparro
edu.description: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer with experience building modern web applications using React, Angular, TypeScript and Laravel. Strong interest in frontend architecture, user experience and scalable web applications.

jeremy.title: Jeremy Intriago Pachay
jeremy.description: Full Stack Developer focused on building robust and modern web applications, combining solid backend logic with dynamic and intuitive user interfaces. Experienced in working with technologies such as React, Angular, TypeScript, and Laravel, contributing to projects centered on performance, scalability, and excellent user experience. Passionate about web development, software architecture, and creating clean, efficient, and adaptable solutions for different digital environments and needs.

marc.title: Marc Gilvert Orea
marc.description: Full-stack developer with experience in building comprehensive web applications
